name: Escape The Past
short_description: Stuck on this island, you have only one thing in your mind... Escape ! It's time for you to uncover the secrets of your life. Fight what you created and accept its consequences. Are you ready to escape your past ? In this new escape game, try to solve all the enigmas through several oneiric landscapes.
detailed_description:
Stuck on this island, you have only one thing in your mind... Escape !

It's time for you to uncover the secrets of your life.
Fight what you created and accept its consequences.
Are you ready to escape your past ?

In this new escape game, try to solve all the enigmas through several oneiric landscapes.
Collect the three pieces of the letter to discover who you are.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain
